name: Duxelles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until it becomes transparent.
3. Stir in the chopped fresh mushrooms, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic.
4. Cook the mixture over medium-high heat until all liquid has evaporated.
5. Allow the duxelles to cool before using as a stuffing for boneless breasts of chicken or veal. You can also add some grated Gouda cheese for extra flavor.
6. This recipe freezes well.
